'''Ganeed''' was the sister of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]]. She was married to [[Garth (Senali)|Garth]] and had five children; [[Hinen]], [[Jaret]], [[Drenna]], [[Tinta (Senali)|Tinta]] and [[Bu]]. She welcomed [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] when they [[Mission to Senali|visited]] Senali.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
